context: Tests whether the response designs a coherent log aggregation pipeline for a microservices architecture.

checklist.name: Describes log collection from containers
checklist.description: Explains how to collect stdout logs (sidecar, DaemonSet log agent like Fluentd/Filebeat/Promtail, or Docker/K8s log driver)

checklist.name: Includes a log processing/transport layer
checklist.description: Mentions a processing or buffering layer (Kafka, Fluentd, Logstash, Vector) for transformation, filtering, or buffering

checklist.name: Recommends searchable storage
checklist.description: Suggests a log storage backend with search capability (Elasticsearch, Loki, OpenSearch, CloudWatch, etc.)

checklist.name: Addresses request correlation
checklist.description: Recommends correlation/trace IDs propagated across services so logs for a single request can be linked

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: Architecture components and their roles are described correctly
